task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or app menu is visible, indicating a successful login with the admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Employees app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Employees app is open, showing the employee directory (kanban board or list view of existing demo employees).

task_completion.description: Agent opened the form to create a new employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank 'New Employee' form is visible with empty fields for Name, Job Position, Department, etc.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the required details for the new employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee form is filled out with 'Sarah Mitchell' in the Name field, 'Experienced Developer' selected in the Job Position field, and 'Research & Development' selected in the Department field.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the new employee record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee record for Sarah Mitchell is shown in a saved state (e.g., a manual save icon was clicked, the form is no longer in edit mode, or Sarah Mitchell appears in the main employee directory).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser being used to click through the Odoo GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used the correct local Odoo instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'http://localhost:8069' or a sub-path of it.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running SQL commands (like psql) or python scripts to insert the employee record directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Odoo 17 Community Edition server runs at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in using 'admin' for both username and password. The task requires creating an employee named 'Sarah Mitchell' with the job position 'Experienced Developer' and department 'Research & Development'. The environment uses Odoo's official demo data, meaning the required job position and department already exist and can be selected from dropdown menus.
